message:
✨ Migrate Events dashboard to DashboardPage component (#477)

Reduces Events.tsx from ~1220 lines to ~490 lines (60% reduction) by
using the unified DashboardPage component with beforeCards prop.

Changes:
- Remove SortableEventCard, EventDragPreviewCard components
- Remove manual DnD imports and setup
- Remove useDashboard destructuring and modal handling
- Use beforeCards prop for tabs rendering
- Preserve all event filtering, stats, and chart logic

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
